message:
test(command): add exhaustive is_write_command vs COMMAND_TABLE guard

Prevents AOF data loss regressions: iterates ALL commands in
COMMAND_TABLE, checks that every command with "write" in its flags
returns true from is_write_command(). If a new write command is added
to the table without being added to is_write_command, this test will
fail with a clear error message naming the missing command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
